entries.definition:
th–r–y (somewhat overlapping with ث/ر/و th–r–w) moisture,
to moisten; soil, wet soil; goodness. Of this root, ثَرَى tharā occurs
entries.definition_english:
th–r–y (somewhat overlapping with ث/ر/و th–r–w) moisture,
to moisten; soil, wet soil; goodness. Of this root, ثَرَى tharā occurs
